dialogos.texto_en: That's right, Uesugi-san.\nWhy don't we invite Raiha-chan to come along too?
Raiha too?\nIs that okay?
Of course!
We will be a family soon, after all.
What?
It'll be a good opportunity to deepen our friendship.
Yeah, why not, let's all go together.
A f-f-f-f-family?!
Hey, Yotsuba? What's wrong?\nWhy is your face all red?
U-u-u-Uesugi-san!!
What?
A-a-about being family, that's not what I meant\nearlier! I just thought it would be fun\nif Raiha-chan came along!
Ah... There's no need to panic.\nI know it's just in your nature to say impulsive\nthings like that.
That's so Yotsuba.
You're not completely \nagainst the idea, are you?
B-but...
Ahem.
What, Itsuki?
I'll make sure not to get in your way on this trip,\nso don't worry.
Huh?
Wh-what are YOU so concerned about?\nYou should worry about yourself.
Well, it's natural to want to be helpful.\nYotsuba still speaks to you so politely, Fu-kun, and it\ndoesn't seem like anything has changed, am I right?
Oooohh...
Now, now. This is Yotsuba and Futaro-kun\nwe're talking about.\nI don't think anyone expects them to move very fast.
Ugh...
(Hopefully I'm not just imagining it, but\n Ichika's support doesn't sound very supportive...)
(I know! \n I know that since I confessed, nothing has\n really changed between Yotsuba and I!)
(I had my own exams, and Yotsuba needed\n to study a wide range of subjects to be able\n to pass her entrance exam. We had no time!)
(...However, now that entrance exams are over\n and I am going to Tokyo, from here on out\n we'll be forced into a long-distance relationship.)
(I have no intention of doubting Yotsuba's feelings.\n However, as two first-time lovers in a long-distance\n relationship...to be honest, I'm pretty anxious.)
(That's why, on this trip, I want to deepen my bond\n with Yotsuba even more.\n That's why...!)
(I will kiss her! On THIS TRIP!!)
(Well, saying it like that,\n I haven't even kissed her yet...)
(You will show her what kind of man you are,\n Uesugi Futaro!!)
Oh, by the way.\nDon't worry about Raiha-chan's travel expenses.\nSince we're inviting her, we'll take care of it.
O-okay.\nI feel kinda bad. Thanks for the help.
